info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the NextGen Manager. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub

get.description: Retrieve the information of the Organizations.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organizations the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

get.description: Retrieve the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Organization identifier

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

put.description: Update the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Organization identifier

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

delete.description: Delete the information of the organization with the matching organization identifier.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Organization identifier

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

get.description: Retrieves the information of the Projects.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organizations the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the projects the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: has_module
parameters.description: This boolean specifies whether to Filter Projects which has the Module of type passed in the moduleType parameter or not

parameters.name: module_type
parameters.description: Project's module type

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.Link

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

get.description: Retrieve the information of the Secrets.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Slug field of secrets

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Secret types on which the filter will be applied

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: Expand current scope to include all child scopes

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

example-list-secret-response-yaml.value:
- secret:
    name: example_secret
    slug: example_secret
    org: default
    project: example_project
    tags:
      property1: example_secret
    description: example_secret
    spec:
      type: SSHKeyPath
      port: 80
      username: example_secret
      key_path: example_secret
      encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
  created_at: 1234567890
  updated_at: 1234567890
  draft: false
  governance_metatdata: null

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: private_secret
parameters.description: This would be used to define secret as private.

last_modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp for the project

harness_managed.description: This indicates if this Organization is managed by Harness or not. If True, Harness can manage and modify this Organization.

SecretSpec.title: SecretSpec

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

SecretSpec.description: Details of the Secret defined in Harness

SSHKeyPathSpec.title: SSHKeyPath
SSHKeyPathSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

encrypted_passphrase.description: This is the passphrase provided while creating the SSH key for local encryption

SSHKeyReferenceSpec.title: SSHKeyReference
SSHKeyReferenceSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

encrypted_passphrase.description: This is the passphrase provided while creating the SSH key for local encryption

SSHPasswordSpec.title: SSHPassword
SSHPasswordSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

SSHKerberosTGTKeyTabFileSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

SSHKerberosTGTPasswordSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

SecretFileSpec.title: SecretFile
SecretFileSpec.description: This is the SSH key authentication details defined in Harness.

type.description: This specifies the type of secret

example-create-secret-response-yaml.value:
secret:
  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_secret
  description: example_secret
  spec:
    type: SSHKeyPath
    port: 80
    username: example_secret
    key_path: example_secret
    encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
created_at: 1234567890
updated_at: 1234567890
draft: false
governance_metatdata: null

      port: 80
